summary: Completed testing of Agent Provisioning feature - live-equip system for running agents. All 29 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: 5 action buttons, status chips, custom nudge input, and proper sandbox-first dependency enforcement. Create Sandbox correctly fails with 'Insufficient credits' due to 0 credit Conway API key (expected behavior).
critical_code_review_comments: Security verified: No conway-terminal or openclaw installed on host system
Security verified: system-prompt.ts reads provisioning-status.json (not BOOT_REPORT)
system-prompt.ts has loadProvisioningStatus() function that injects Layer 5.5 provisioning context
All tool installations happen INSIDE sandbox VM - host system remains clean
Nudge system working correctly - messages persisted and displayed in UI
test_credentials: Conway API Key: cnwy_k_lWSyQNftsEMNiTknTVW_DNLW71MVeK_u (0 credits - sandbox creation fails as expected)
seed_data_creation: Test nudges sent via backend API and UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agent Provisioning feature fully functional. API routes are under /api/provision/ prefix (not /api/agent-setup/ from old wizard). Backend endpoints: GET /status, POST /create-sandbox, POST /install-terminal, POST /install-openclaw, POST /load-skills, POST /nudge, POST /nudge/custom. Frontend page accessed via 'Provision Agent' nav item (id='setup'). The old test file test_agent_setup.py uses deprecated routes - use test_provision_api.py instead.

backend_apis: GET /api/provision/status - returns sandbox, tools, skills_loaded, nudges, credits_cents
POST /api/provision/create-sandbox - fails with 'Insufficient credits' (expected with 0 credits)
POST /api/provision/install-terminal - fails gracefully with 'No sandbox yet. Create one first.'
POST /api/provision/install-openclaw - fails gracefully with 'No sandbox yet. Create one first.'
POST /api/provision/load-skills - fails gracefully with 'No sandbox yet. Create one first.'
POST /api/provision/nudge - sends default autonomy nudge message
POST /api/provision/nudge/custom - sends custom message (verified in status)
frontend_ui: Provision Agent page renders at 'setup' nav item in sidebar
5 action buttons: Create Sandbox, Install Terminal, Install OpenClaw, Load Skills, Go Autonomous
Only 'Create Sandbox' button is active when no sandbox exists (others disabled/grayed)
Status chips show correct state (Sandbox: none, Terminal: none, OpenClaw: none, Skills: none)
Recent messages section shows sent nudges with timestamps
Toast notification shows on nudge send ('Nudge sent — agent will see it next turn')
Create sandbox shows 'Insufficient credits' error toast (expected)
security_checks: No conway-terminal installed on host (which conway-terminal returns nothing)
No openclaw installed on host (which openclaw returns nothing)
